use_cases: Validating password strength in user registration forms
Providing real-time feedback during account password creation
Enforcing security policies in admin or settings panels
Showing password strength in e-commerce checkout flows
Helping users create stronger credentials in dev-tool authentication
ai_summary: A customizable password strength meter component that evaluates password complexity against configurable criteria including length, uppercase letters, numbers, and special characters. Displays a color-coded strength bar and requirement checklist to guide users toward creating secure passwords. Supports theming via custom colors, custom requirements, and Tailwind styling overrides.
